title: Available assistance - Ministry of Education
content:
Ngā momo tautoko e taea ana

## Available assistance
Find out about some of the help, provisions and financial support available to your child at school.
- Deaf and hard of hearing 1
- Scholarships and study awards 1
- Te tono tahua kura noho Apply for a boarding allowance You can apply for a boarding allowance for a secondary school or kura student if you are their legal parent or guardian.
You can apply for a boarding allowance for a secondary school or kura student if you are their legal parent or guardian.
- Ngā tahua kura noho mā ngā tau 9 - 13 Boarding allowances for Years 9 to 13 If your child lives far away from the nearest school, or faces significant difficulties, we may be able to assist with the cost of boarding.
If your child lives far away from the nearest school, or faces significant difficulties, we may be able to assist with the cost of boarding.
- He kaiwhakamāori mā ngā mātua turi Interpreters for Deaf parents Find an interpreter to help you communicate with your child's school.
Find an interpreter to help you communicate with your child's school.
- Ngā pokapū hapori mō te ako Learning community hubs We help set up groups where communities can learn about supporting their children's education.
We help set up groups where communities can learn about supporting their children's education.
- Ngā whakataetae Ngarimu mō te tito waiata me te hanga kiriata Ngarimu video and waiata composition competitions Ngarimu video and waiata composition competitions for Māori ākonga | students in Years 7 to 13. Applications are now open.
Ngarimu video and waiata composition competitions for Māori ākonga | students in Years 7 to 13. Applications are now open.
- Te āwhina waka kura School transport assistance If your child lives far away from the closest school they can enrol at, they may qualify for a free school bus or financial support.
If your child lives far away from the closest school they can enrol at, they may qualify for a free school bus or financial support.
